cards.howToBuyDesc: The full buy-and-pay flow, step by step
cards.claimsDesc: File a claim and track it yourself
cards.faqDesc: The answers customers ask for most

help.faqSub: Search or pick a category to see answers

faqs.q: What documents are needed to buy migrant worker insurance?
faqs.a: A copy of each worker’s passport and work permit, plus employer details. Enter workers one by one or upload in bulk via Excel.

faqs.q: How long does it take to issue a worker policy?
faqs.a: Once payment is made, the policy is issued within 24 hours and sent by email and in the portal.

faqs.q: Can I see prices without giving personal details?
faqs.a: Yes. You see real prices instantly without entering personal details, and we never cold-call.

faqs.q: Can I buy online myself, or do I need an agent?
faqs.a: Both — buy online yourself or have a professional agent assist you, at the same price.

faqs.q: How can I file a claim?
faqs.a: File via the customer portal or TKR’s LINE, attaching photos and the relevant documents.

faqs.q: How do I track a claim?
faqs.a: Follow the claim status timeline anytime in the customer portal — from submission to approval and payout.
Pay in full, 0% installments on participating credit cards, or scan to pay via PromptPay QR.

faqs.q: Is coverage active immediately after paying?
faqs.a: Once payment succeeds, coverage is confirmed instantly and the policy is emailed to you.

faqs.q: Can I cancel a policy and get a refund?
faqs.a: Yes, subject to each policy’s terms — premium is refunded pro-rata for the remaining period. Contact our team to proceed.
Typically 7–14 business days after documents are complete, depending on your original payment method.

faqs.q: Which garages or service centers can I use?
faqs.a: Use in-network garages and certified centers with no out-of-pocket payment. Check the latest list in the portal.

faqs.q: Do I pay upfront at partner hospitals?
faqs.a: No upfront payment at partner hospitals — just show your card and verify your identity.
